title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 429.250 - The execution
text:
429.250.  The execution. — The execution to be issued shall be a special fieri facias, and shall be in conformity with the judgment, and such writ shall be returnable as ordinary executions; and the advertisement, sale and conveyance of real or personal estate under the same shall be made as under ordinary executions.
(RSMo 1939 § 3561) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3171; 1919 § 7231; 1909 § 8227
